name: trivium
description: Trivium — multi-agent task evaluator. Self-hosted marketplace exposing the trivium plugin.

plugins.name: trivium
plugins.description: Three isolated reviewers (idea-writer, technical-researcher, QA) score a task 1-10 independently; passes only if all three score > 7. Use /trivium-bug, /trivium-feature, /trivium-analysis against any project.
